from typing import TypeVar

T = TypeVar("T")

def first(items: list[T]) -> T:
    return items[0]

def last(items: list[T]) -> T:
    return items[-1]

def clamp(value: T, low: T, high: T) -> T:
    return max(low, min(value, high))

def pick_longer(a: T, b: T) -> T:
    if len(a) >= len(b):
        return a
    return b

def merge_dicts(a: dict[str, T], b: dict[str, T]) -> dict[str, T]:
    result = dict(a)
    result.update(b)
    return result

K = TypeVar("K")
V = TypeVar("V")

def invert_mapping(d: dict[K, V]) -> dict[V, K]:
    return {v: k for k, v in d.items()}
